name: Expense entry create flow
description: Implement the expense create flow including the visibility model. Backend: POST /api/v1/expenses (requires: amount, category_id, source, payer_id, date; optional: note, group_ids, visibility). Visibility enum (private | household) is stored on each expense and enforced server-side from creation: private expenses are never returned in household feeds. Default visibility resolves from household settings, overridable per-request. Payer defaults to creator if unset. Frontend: Add Expense page with form (amount-first), category picker, source picker, payer selector (household members), date picker, note, group multi-select, and visibility toggle. New expense is optimistically appended to the feed. Covers docs/product-specs/expense-tracking.md, expense-ownership.md, and data-visibility.md. Does NOT include edit/delete, search, or quick-add shortcut.
